name: vaultsync
description: Local-first Git sync automation for Markdown vault repositories: debounce Git-visible changes into commits, run verification, and when an upstream exists rebase and push with LLM conflict handling while respecting dibs locks.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first Git sync automation for Markdown vault repositories: debounce Git-visible changes into commits, run verif...
interface.longDescription: Local-first Git sync automation for Markdown vault repositories: debounce Git-visible changes into commits, run verification, and when an upstream exists rebase and push with LLM conflict handling while respecting dibs locks.
